This package contains the Python implementation to access the OWASP ZAP API.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zapv2 because implementation to access the OWASP ZAP API (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zapv2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zapv2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zapv2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
